summary: V3 Execute and Orders API Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. POST /api/v3/execute/{symbol} with force=true creates paper orders with correct regime-specific parameters. GET /api/v3/orders returns order history. GET /api/v3/orders/stats returns stats grouped by regime. Frontend V3 panel shows status badge, regime, action, score breakdown bars, execute/force buttons, and recent orders list.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/v3/execute/MNQ?force=true v3_order contains: v3_regime, v3_tactic, trade_symbol, action, quantity, lot_pct, entry_type, stop_loss, take_profit, trailing_stop, paper_trade=true
✅ POST /api/v3/execute/MNQ (without force) when N3=WAIT returns status=waiting with message
✅ POST /api/v3/execute/MNQ?force=true inserts order in MongoDB (verified via GET /api/v3/orders)
✅ GET /api/v3/orders returns orders list with count > 0 after executing
✅ GET /api/v3/orders/stats returns stats grouped by regime (TRANSICAO: 11 orders)
✅ V3 order quantity calculation: base_qty * lot_pct / 100 (MES regimes=50%, MNQ regimes=75% or 100%)
✅ V3 order trade_symbol matches regime config: TRANSICAO→MES (MESM26)
✅ Warm cache: second call to /api/v3/execute faster than first
✅ Frontend: V3 panel shows 'FILTROS OK' badge with data-testid=v3-status
✅ Frontend: V3 regime 'TRANSICAO' displayed with data-testid=v3-regime
✅ Frontend: V3 action 'WAIT' displayed with data-testid=v3-action
✅ Frontend: Execute/Force buttons visible with data-testid=force-v3-btn
✅ Frontend: Score breakdown bars shown (VIX, Yield Curve, Gamma, Term Structure)
✅ Frontend: Recent V3 orders list shows after executing (paper orders with P badge)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_v3_execute.py (new test file for V3 execute and orders endpoints)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: V3 orders created via force=true execution during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Execute and Orders API fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/v3/execute/{symbol}?force=true creates paper orders with regime-specific params (v3_regime, v3_tactic, trade_symbol, lot_pct, quantity). 2) TRANSICAO regime uses MES symbol with 50% lot. 3) GET /api/v3/orders returns order history sorted by timestamp desc. 4) GET /api/v3/orders/stats returns aggregated stats by regime. 5) Frontend V3 panel shows status badge (SINAL ATIVO/FILTROS OK/AGUARDANDO), regime, action, score breakdown bars, execute/force buttons, and recent orders list. 6) Weekend handling: OFI/TICK/CVD fallback to simulated data (expected). 7) Current observed: regime=TRANSICAO (5/13), status=FILTERS_PASSED, action=WAIT, 11 paper orders created.

feature_verification.v3_orders_stats_endpoint: Working - GET /api/v3/orders/stats returns stats by regime
feature_verification.v3_order_fields: Working - Contains v3_regime, v3_tactic, trade_symbol, action, quantity, lot_pct, entry_type, stop_loss, take_profit, trailing_stop, paper_trade
feature_verification.frontend_v3_panel: Working - Shows status, regime, action, score bars, buttons, orders list

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked. DataBento trades return simulated/empty on weekends (expected behavior). Paper trading is the default mode - no live orders sent to SignalStack.
